actor_relation_claims.quote_text: investments of $500 million and $250 million by the Equity Provider and funds advised by West Face, respectively
investments of $500 million and $250 million by the Equity Provider and funds advised by West Face, respectively

On July 28, 2013, Hudson’s Bay entered into an equity investment agreement (the “Teachers’ Investment Agreement”) with Teachers’ and the Equity Provider, pursuant to which Hudson’s Bay agreed to issue an aggregate of up to the Canadian dollar equivalent of $500 million of Hudson’s Bay’s common shares
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: Teachers’ Investment Agreement with equity issuance of up to the Canadian dollar equivalent of $500 million

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: Teachers’ is providing to Hudson’s Bay a guarantee of the Equity Provider’s obligation to pay the aggregate purchase price for the Hudson’s Bay common shares and warrants to be issued to the Equity Provider thereunder.
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: guarantee of the Equity Provider’s obligation to pay the aggregate purchase price

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: Hudson’s Bay also entered into an equity investment agreement (the “West Face Investment Agreement” and, together with the Teachers’ Investment Agreement, the “Equity Investment Agreements”) with funds advised by West Face pursuant to which Hudson’s Bay agreed to issue an aggregate of up to the Canadian dollar equivalent of $250 million of Hudson’s Bay common shares
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: West Face Investment Agreement with equity issuance of up to the Canadian dollar equivalent of $250 million

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: The respective obligations of each of the HB Investors to provide financing under the applicable Equity Investment Agreements are subject to certain conditions
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: provide financing under the applicable Equity Investment Agreements

event_claims.description: Hudson’s Bay entered into the Teachers’ Investment Agreement with Teachers’ and the Equity Provider for an equity issuance of up to the Canadian dollar equivalent of $500 million.
event_claims.quote_text: On July 28, 2013, Hudson’s Bay entered into an equity investment agreement (the “Teachers’ Investment Agreement”) with Teachers’ and the Equity Provider, pursuant to which Hudson’s Bay agreed to issue an aggregate of up to the Canadian dollar equivalent of $500 million of Hudson’s Bay’s common shares

event_claims.description: Teachers’ provided Hudson’s Bay a guarantee of the Equity Provider’s payment obligation under the Teachers’ Investment Agreement.
event_claims.quote_text: Pursuant to the Teachers’ Investment Agreement, Teachers’ is providing to Hudson’s Bay a guarantee of the Equity Provider’s obligation to pay the aggregate purchase price for the Hudson’s Bay common shares and warrants to be issued to the Equity Provider thereunder.

event_claims.description: Hudson’s Bay entered into the West Face Investment Agreement with funds advised by West Face for an equity issuance of up to the Canadian dollar equivalent of $250 million.
event_claims.quote_text: on July 28, 2013, Hudson’s Bay also entered into an equity investment agreement (the “West Face Investment Agreement” and, together with the Teachers’ Investment Agreement, the “Equity Investment Agreements”) with funds advised by West Face pursuant to which Hudson’s Bay agreed to issue an aggregate of up to the Canadian dollar equivalent of $250 million of Hudson’s Bay common shares

event_claims.description: Hudson’s Bay closed its underwritten prospectus offering of subscription receipts, raising gross proceeds of CDN $275.3 million.
event_claims.quote_text: on September 10, 2013, Hudson’s Bay closed its underwritten prospectus offering of 16,050,000 subscription receipts at a price of CDN $17.15 per subscription receipt raising gross proceeds of CDN $275.3 million.

event_claims.description: The debt commitment letter obtained by Hudson’s Bay at execution of the merger agreement remains in effect and unmodified.
event_claims.quote_text: the debt commitment letter obtained by Hudson’s Bay at the time of execution of the merger agreement remains in effect and unmodified.

event_claims.description: Bank of America, N.A. and Royal Bank of Canada, collectively the Lenders, agreed to provide debt financing under the debt commitment letter.

event_claims.description: Amendments were made to Hudson’s Bay’s existing facility on August 16, 2013, so restatement to the CDN $750 million asset-based revolving facility was no longer required.
event_claims.quote_text: amendments were made to Hudson’s Bay existing facility to provide for the required amendments on August 16, 2013, and therefore the restatement to the CDN $750 million asset-based revolving facility is no longer required.
